extraction.one_line_summary: BENNETT Sam won the sprint on Stage 3 after an easy 34.5km/h first two hours following yesterday's brutal 51km/h average pace.
tactical_patterns: Team Sky exploited intermediate sprint at 39km for bonus seconds with Kwiatkovski/Bernal despite no GC threat imminent.
Sprint teams neutralized break with 39km remaining despite 5.5min gap, revealing headwind risk calculation threshold.
Narrow bridge crash at ~35km exposed positioning vulnerability even on flat sprint stages when GC riders caught.

rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: Third career Paris-Nice stage 3 win suggests specific affinity for mid-week positioning after hard opening stages
rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: negative: Failed to win third consecutive stage despite being favorite, finished only 9th suggesting recovery deficit from 51km/h Stage 2
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: negative: Abandoned with nausea and weakness while 17+ minutes down, concerning form collapse for UAE Emirates
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: Caught behind narrow bridge crash in closing kilometers indicating persistent positioning problems in modern bunch
